raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Watershed Coordinator Program has proven success but has received limited funding for several years.",
    "It is imperative to invest in diverse ecosystems during the period of climate change.",
    "California's watersheds provide benefits for residents and critical habitat for thousands of species.",
    "Tailored approaches are essential for the successful management of California's diverse watersheds.",
    "From 2000 to 2014, California invested $92 million in community-based watershed management efforts.",
    "Watershed coordinators were successful in building local support and generated an average of three dollars from federal and philanthropic sources for every one dollar invested.",
    "Establishing the Ecosystem Resilience Program will ensure critical funding for effective management of California’s diverse watersheds.",
    "Community-based watershed management planning builds local awareness and support for sustaining healthy environments."
  ]
}
```
